title: BITS Pilani is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: BITS Pilani is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BITS Pilani. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
